problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
